items.title: Lisbon Tops Europe's Summer City-Break Rankings
items.summary: Lisbon is again among Europe's most-booked city destinations for summer 2026, with strong demand across Alfama, Chiado and Bairro Alto.

items.title: Porto Expands Riverside Walking Routes
items.summary: New self-guided cultural trails connect historic landmarks across Porto's UNESCO-listed Ribeira district.

items.title: Algarve Beaches Among Europe's Best for 2026
items.summary: Several Algarve beaches feature in this year's European rankings for water quality and scenery.

items.title: Sintra Highlights Its Gastronomic Heritage
items.summary: Sintra promotes its historic confectionery — travesseiros and queijadas — with a new food trail across the town.
